name: tipcat-mousepads
description: Tip Cat Studios mouse pad pipeline

prompts.metadata: Analyze this mouse pad design image and provide structured metadata: title (max 60 characters), teaser, full description highlighting unique elements, exactly 13 tags, category, mood, design highlights (3 items), material (rubber/fabric), colors, and Shopify-formatted HTML description. Return only valid JSON.
prompts.lifestyle_table: A realistic product photograph of a mouse pad with the provided design placed on a clean desk with a gaming mouse on top, professional desk setup. horizontal 16:9 aspect ratio
prompts.lifestyle_hand: Realistic mouse pad product mockup using attached product design image held in someone's hands showing the texture and colors in natural lighting
